task: Conduct initial research on AI market trends in Q1 2026. Focus on: 1) Major funding rounds, 2) New product launches, 3) Regulatory developments. Provide a structured summary with key findings.

Based on the market research conducted by the research analyst, identify 3-5 investment opportunities in the AI sector. For each opportunity, provide: ticker symbol, investment thesis, risk rating (1-5), and recommended position size for a $100K portfolio.

Review the identified investment opportunities and conduct a comprehensive risk assessment. Consider: market volatility, sector concentration risk, regulatory risks, and liquidity concerns. Provide specific stop-loss recommendations for each position.

Synthesize all previous analyses into a final investment recommendation report. Include: 1) Executive summary, 2) Recommended portfolio allocation across the AI opportunities, 3) Risk-adjusted expected returns, 4) Implementation timeline, 5) Key monitoring metrics. Reference all prior analyses.
